```esql
FROM country_addresses, country_airports, country_languages
| WHERE country LIKE "United*"
| SORT country ASC, count DESC
```

| count:long | country:keyword |
| --- | --- |
| 17 | United Kingdom |
| 1 | United Kingdom |
| 129 | United States |
| 1 | United States |
| 1 | United States |
